full_text:
Xing Yong (Zi’ang) 邢顒 (子昂)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xing Yong (邢顒), styledZi’ang (子昂), was born in Mo county, Hejian commandery. Governed competently. Advised against selecting Cao Zhi as heir. Xing Yong was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Xing Yong lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
